formats.name: Climate Tech Exit Lab Preview
formats.valueProp: A truncated, high-value preview of the Climate Tech Exit Lab framework. Gives small-check investors and founders the core mental model for how climate tech exits actually work — and positions BTC as the team that built that framework.
contentOutline: Why climate tech exits are different from traditional tech (10 min)
The 3 exit archetypes BTC tracks — acquisition, project finance, strategic partnership (15 min)
Live case walk-through: a climate tech exit story (10 min)
What this means for a $10K check — risk, return, timeline (10 min)
formats.coHostAngle: Partner org hosts + promotes to their list. BTC delivers the content. Co-branded across all materials.
formats.notes: This is the primary webinar format to develop first. It is the anchor content for the webinar partner program.

formats.name: Operator Office Hours
formats.valueProp: A Q&A-first format where Keyona and Bryan field real questions from climate tech operators and founders on scaling, fundraising, and exits. No slides. Practical, tactical, real.
contentOutline: Brief BTC intro + why we do this (5 min)
Live Q&A — audience submits questions, Keyona + Bryan answer (45 min)
3 resources or frameworks BTC recommends (5 min)
formats.coHostAngle: Partner org curates the audience and submits questions in advance. Keeps quality high and gives them editorial input.
formats.notes: Good for deeper engagement with orgs that already have warm communities. Second format to develop after Exit Lab Preview.

formats.name: LP Intro Webinar
formats.valueProp: A structured, professional introduction to BTC for institutional investors and foundations. Covers the fund thesis, the climate tech landscape BTC operates in, deal flow strategy, and what a partnership or investment looks like.
contentOutline: The climate tech nano VC thesis — why now, why BTC (10 min)
Our deal flow and portfolio strategy (10 min)
What we are building toward — Climate Tech Exit Lab, fund II (10 min)
What partnership or investment looks like — structures, minimums, timelines (5 min)
formats.coHostAngle: Not a co-branded format. BTC-only. Used for warm institutional investor meetings, not public webinars.
formats.notes: This format is the ABM content asset. Develop after the Exit Lab Preview is locked. Will be used in the Equality Fund meeting prep and other institutional outreach.
